title: Function-level forensics (Tornhill X-Ray): per-function churn
description: v1.1 headline: per-function churn via diff hunk parsing - the largest analytical upgrade available and the one CodeScene paywalls. Big lift (function boundary detection; consider indentation heuristics before tree-sitter). Start with a design/discuss cycle, not code. Context: .planning/superpowers/plans/2026-06-12-agent-native-pivot.md (v1.1 candidates footer).

title: Self-validation: hotspot-rank vs bugfix-density correlation
description: With bugfix linkage shipped (FileForensics.bugfix_commits), compute the correlation between hotspot rank and bug-fix density across several real repos and publish the number in the README - the tool proving its own pitch. Small: a script or bbu subcommand + doc.

title: Chore: guard top-3 deterministic tiebreak; refresh artifact action SHAs
description: Two ten-minute items from v1.0.0 final review: (1) guard.py top-3 selection has arbitrary order among equal ratios - add secondary sort by path + test; (2) upload/download-artifact v4 SHAs emit Node-20 deprecation warnings (forced Node 24 from 2026-06-16) - bump to current SHAs in .github/workflows/release.yml.
